Marina

Welcome aboard

Your work,
recognised.

Marina is your team's AI chief of staff. This quick setup connects this Mac so the effort you put in shows up for you — automatically, without status updates or busywork.

Takes about 2 minutes · 4 steps

The basics

What Marina does for you

Punch in, punch out

Start your day in one click. Your team sees you're available — no “good morning” message needed.

Credit for what you ship

It links your commits, PRs and focus time to you — your work speaks for itself.

Breaks & blockers, handled

Step away or flag you're stuck in a click. Your manager sees “on break” — never the details.

Leave without the awkward ask

Request time off right from the menu bar. It routes to your manager for approval.

Your privacy, in plain words

What's shared — and what isn't

What Marina sees
  • The app in the foreground (e.g. Code, Safari)
  • Whether you're active or idle
  • Your punch-in / break / focus state
What it never sees
  • Keystrokes, messages or file contents
  • Screenshots or window titles, unless your team opts in
  • Anything while paused or off the clock
You stay in control. One click in the menu bar pauses everything — your manager only ever sees “paused.” You can unpair this device anytime from Settings on the web.
By continuing you agree to your org's policy

Almost there

Connect this Mac

1

On the Marina web app, open Settings → Pair a device and tap Generate code.

Advanced · server address

You're all set

Welcome, there 🎉

Marina now lives in your menu bar — look for the ● Marina icon at the top-right of your screen. Click it anytime to:

● Marina Available · 0h 0m
▶︎ Punch in for today
☕ Take a break ⌘⇧B
✓ Mark work as done ⌘⇧D
🌴 Request leave
⏸ Pause tracking anytime
